## Highlights

- **Repo went public.** One-line install works without GitHub auth.
- **Rebrand `engineering-team` → `ginee`.** Install path is now `.agents/ginee/`; the installer auto-migrates pre-rebrand installs on first `--update-only` run.
- **Orchestrator renamed `project-manager` → `team-lead`.** `project-manager` retained as a permanent alias — existing `@project-manager` dispatches keep working.
- **Installer fetches release tarballs by default** (`--ref latest`). SHA256-verified; no `git` needed for tagged installs. `--ref main` / `--ref <sha>` still falls through to `git clone`.
- **Documentation site live** at [kostiantyn-matsebora.github.io/ginee](https://kostiantyn-matsebora.github.io/ginee/).
- **D21 — context-economy enforcement gate.** Three-layer mechanical guard on this repo's own PRs (Claude hook + git hooks + CI). Adopter-invisible; framework-dev only.

**Full Changelog:** https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/compare/v0.3.0...v0.4.0
